src/main/java/io/github/amanzat/util/Fil.general_idea: Add Javadoc comments to clarify the purpose of path separator constants.
src/main/java/io/github/amanzat/util/Fil.human_impl: Added /** ... */ blocks above UNIX_SEPARATOR and WINDOWS_SEPARATOR fields.

src/test/java/io/github/amanzat/util/Str.general_idea: Convert imperative unit tests for isEmpty, length, isBlank, toUpperCase, toLowerCase, truncateWithMarker, leftPad, and rightPad into JUnit 5 ParameterizedTests using CsvSource.
Remove static imports for TestUtils constants that are no longer used after refactoring tests to use inline data.
Add consistent spacing after commas in CsvSource annotations for existing parameterized tests.

src/test/java/io/github/amanzat/util/Tes.general_idea: Remove the unused constant DUMMY_STRING from the test utility class.
src/test/java/io/github/amanzat/util/Tes.human_impl: -    public static final String DUMMY_STRING = "dummy string";

src/test/java/io/github/amanzat/util/Tes.general_idea: Remove the unused constant ABC_STRING from the test utility class.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Bump Lombok dependency to a newer version compatible with Java 21.
Bump SLF4J dependency to a newer version.
Bump JUnit Jupiter dependency to a newer version.
Bump AssertJ dependency to a newer version.
Add Mockito as a new test dependency.
Bump Maven Compiler Plugin to a version supporting Java 21 features.
Bump Maven Source Plugin to a newer version.
Bump Maven JAR Plugin to a newer version.
Add Maven Javadoc Plugin for generating documentation.
Bump Maven Surefire Plugin to a newer version.
Add Maven GPG Plugin for signing artifacts during release.
Bump JaCoCo Maven Plugin to a newer version.
Add Central Publishing Maven Plugin for deploying to Maven Central.
Add standard project metadata like name, URL, licenses, developers, and SCM info.
Configure distribution management for deploying snapshots and releases to OSSRH.
Add a Maven profile for GPG signing with loopback pinentry mode.
Move dependency versions from dependencyManagement to direct dependencies for clarity.
Comment out the execution for generating a test JAR artifact.
Change the source plugin goal from 'jar' to 'jar-no-fork' for better performance.
